[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 0010001 2
2 1000000 1
3 1001000 2
4 0000001 1
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

01 10 0101011 4
12 21 0000101 2
23 32 0010101 3
34 43 0010100 2

56 65 1000000 1 match 2
67 76 1000000 1 match 2
70 07 1001000 2 match 3

24 42 0010100 2

71 17 0001000 1

61 16 0000001 1 match 4
72 27 0000000 a match 5 6 7

37 73 0000000 a match 5 6 7
